rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation in the model development section, where it is used to support the interpretation of the goodwill intercept as baseline brand goodwill absent advertising. The citing paper does not engage the cited paper's core contribution on cross-media synergy, nor does it build hypotheses, estimation strategy, or results interpretation specifically around that work. Its role is thus a brief background/method precedent rather than a distinct intellectual dependency.
